data.title: Update ticket-system-v3-architecture.md: add marker contract section and fix llm_format path
data.description: Update plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md: (1) Add a section describing the .archived marker contract: who writes it (ticket-lifecycle.sh, backfill script), when (after ARCHIVED event is durable and committed), what the read path checks (reduce_all_tickets fast-skip), self-heal behavior when orphan detected (remove marker, fall back to slow path), and compute_dir_hash() marker-presence extension for cache invalidation. (2) Update lines 243-247 which reference scripts/ticket-llm-format.py — change to ticket_reducer/llm_format.py and note the importlib dance is replaced with a direct package import. Follow existing doc style. testing_mode: not applicable (doc-only).
